post.summary: Logout from the system and redirect to login page

302.description: Found and redirect to login page

get.description: Retrieve the list of data centers
get.summary: Retrieve the list of data centers

200.description: Retrieve the list of data centers successfully

msg.example: failed to fetch data centers: internal server error

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The type of event to query, the value can be only 'system', 'host', and 'instance'.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: The start time of the event to query, the value should be in RFC3339 format (default is 24 hours ago).

parameters.name: stop
parameters.description: The end time of the event to query, the value should be in RFC3339 format (default is now).

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: The page number of the event chunking to fetch (default is 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The size per page of the events to return (default is unlimit).

200.description: Retrieve the list of events successfully

msg.example: failed to fetch events: internal server error

get.summary: Retrieve the list of health checks

200.description: Retrieve the list of health checks successfully

msg.example: failed to fetch health checks: internal server error

200.description: Retrieve the list of integrated applications successfully

msg.example: failed to fetch integrations: internal server error

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: The page number of the event chunking to fetch (default is 1).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The size per page of the events to return (default is unlimit).

200.description: Retrieve the list of nodes successfully

msg.example: failed to fetch nodes: internal server error
